method.purpose_first_search: Rank constant-pair relations by how strongly they serve a declared purpose archetype, with support from fit quality and bounded relation strength.
method.operator_closure: Use a retrieved relation as a multiplicative operator on a known anchor and check whether it produces a known target.

bridge_harmony.read: Relations expected to bridge proportion, boundary, and spatial completion.

expected_relations.rationale: golden ratio into its discriminant root

actualizing_growth.read: Relations expected to express growth or actualization.

context_scaling.read: Relations expected to scale context or dimensional frame.

expected_relations.rationale: half-turn circle context into full-turn context

binding_gathering.read: Relations expected to compress, gather, or return toward unity.

expected_relations.rationale: full turn gathered to half-turn boundary

boundary_differentiation.read: Relations expected to emphasize distinction and boundary.

expected_relations.rationale: circle boundary doubled into full boundary
Justice mode normalized to unit boundary

integrated_relation.read: Relations expected to use a balanced operator mix.

bridge_harmony.read: Relations expected to bridge proportion, boundary, and spatial completion.

withheld_results.rationale: golden ratio into its discriminant root

actualizing_growth.read: Relations expected to express growth or actualization.

context_scaling.read: Relations expected to scale context or dimensional frame.

withheld_results.rationale: half-turn circle context into full-turn context

binding_gathering.read: Relations expected to compress, gather, or return toward unity.

withheld_results.rationale: full turn gathered to half-turn boundary

integrated_relation.read: Relations expected to use a balanced operator mix.

operator_closure_tests.name: sqrt2_square_closure
operator_closure_tests.read: The diagonal-root relation applied twice closes on 2.

operator_closure_tests.name: sqrt3_square_closure
operator_closure_tests.read: The triadic-root relation applied twice closes on 3.

operator_closure_tests.name: sqrt5_square_closure
operator_closure_tests.read: The golden-discriminant root relation applied twice closes on 5.

operator_closure_tests.name: golden_reciprocal_repair
operator_closure_tests.read: The golden growth relation repairs the inverse back to unit.

operator_closure_tests.name: golden_reciprocal_growth
operator_closure_tests.read: The inverse-to-unit relation acts as golden growth.

operator_closure_tests.name: golden_square_closure
operator_closure_tests.read: The unit-to-golden relation applied to phi closes on phi squared, which is also phi plus one.

operator_closure_tests.name: unit_doubling_on_circle
operator_closure_tests.read: A generic unit-doubling relation transfers onto pi and produces tau.

operator_closure_tests.name: unit_halving_on_circle
operator_closure_tests.read: A generic unit-halving relation transfers onto tau and returns pi.

operator_closure_tests.name: circle_full_turn
operator_closure_tests.read: The circle scaling relation takes pi to tau.

operator_closure_tests.name: circle_half_turn
operator_closure_tests.read: The gathering relation compresses full turn to half turn.

interpretation.short_read: Known constants can be searched by relation-purpose rather than object similarity. Some familiar relations act as exact operators, such as one->sqrt2 closing sqrt2 on two.
interpretation.boundary: This is still a small purpose grammar. A relation ranking is not evidence by itself; closure and withheld retrieval tests are the stronger checks.
